scenario: Auto-selecting Deep mode for a security-sensitive production decision
title: Security-sensitive multi-vendor decision triggers Deep mode
user_request: We are selecting a TLS library for our payment processor. What are the security trade-offs between using crypto/tls defaults vs custom configurations?
decision_rationale: Security-sensitive decision with multi-vendor comparison in a production payment context → Deep mode (30-50 calls). Standard would under-cover the security surface.
